sections.paragraph:
Κλαυδία, ας, ἡ (s. e.g., Sb index) Claudia, a Christian mentioned in 2 Ti 4:21.—LGPN I. M-M.

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

LGPN LGPN = A Lexicon of Greek Personal Names—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 546
